# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_WATCHER_ACCUMULATION

**Filed:** 2026-06-01
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** watcher_accumulation
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-ACCUMULATION)

## Hypothesis

The V14E bear-only watcher, when activated, will produce a win rate of at least 55% over a sequence of 100 new bear-only observations, meeting the OP-21 promotion threshold for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE candidate.

## Mechanism

The V14E bear-only watcher (v14_enhanced_watcher.py with V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER = "bear") logs observations to `automation/state/watcher-observations.jsonl` when it detects a bearish v14e setup. We accumulate observations until we have 100 new bear-only samples (since the start of counting). Each observation is graded post-hoc to determine if it was a win or loss based on the engine's hypothetical P&L had it taken the trade.

## Results

| Wins | unknown -- requires live accumulation |
| Losses | unknown -- requires live accumulation |
| Win rate | unknown -- requires live accumulation |

## OP-20 disclosures

Not applicable: this is an analysis of watcher accumulation, not a strategy candidate. OP-20 disclosures are required for candidate proposals only.

## Conclusion

We cannot compute the win rate without accumulating 100 new bear-only observations. The accumulation is in progress; we will update this analysis once the threshold is reached.

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- We lack the observed data to compute the win rate. The accumulation process is ongoing but incomplete.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis supports candidate #3 (V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE) by providing the data needed for its OP-21 promotion gate. It does not conflict with any existing candidate.
